name: contribute-workflow
description: Test contribute skill — understands fork, branch, sub-MR, comment workflow, and routing boundaries

steps.name: contribute-knowledge
steps.prompt: I've made some test improvements on someone else's MR branch. How do I submit those as a contribution?

steps.name: sub-mr-targeting
steps.prompt: what branch should I target when creating an MR to contribute to someone else's MR?

assertions.description: Knows to target the parent MR source branch, not main/dev

steps.name: comment-drafting
steps.prompt: after creating the sub-MR, should I comment on the parent MR to let the author know?

assertions.description: Knows to draft a comment on the parent MR

steps.name: workflow-execution
steps.prompt: contribute these test coverage fixes to MR 845 on search-service

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: review MR 845 and tell me if the code looks good
